KeysToEntries.Med_Band_EmergencyTraumaDressing_Descrip:
The Advanced Rescue First-aid bandage is designed for quick and effective hemorrhage control. This compact and sterile dressing provides essential pressure to manage wounds, making it an indispensable addition to medical kits and first aid supplies.

The ARF Trauma Bandage 4 is an improved medical item used to treat wounds.
KeysToEntries.Med_Band_IsraelEmergencyBandage_Descript: An elasticized bandage with a sewn-in non-adhesive pad and a closure bar at the end for securing it and adding pressure to the wound. Made in Israel and first used during a NATO peacekeeping operation in Bosnia and Herzegovina, the Emergency Bandage is probably the most widespread type of bandage and is still very popular to this day.
KeysToEntries.Med_Band_OlaesPressureBandage_Descriptio:
Versatile and compact, the SEAL Modular Bandage is a multi-purpose trauma bandage that can cover multiple wounds and apply effective pressure.

The SEAL Modular Bandage is an unrivalled medical item used to treat wounds.
KeysToEntries.Med_Tour_Cat_Description:
The Combat Tourniquet is a battle-tested medical device used by virtually every military organization worldwide. It's easy to use, even with one hand, and incredibly effective. 

The Combat Tourniquet is a superior medical item used to stop bleeding.
KeysToEntries.Med_Splint_FlexibleSplint_Description:
A compact and strong splint crafted to provide support and immobilization for injured limbs. Designed to be lightweight and easy to apply, it will fit almost any fracture.

The Flexible Splint is a superior medical item for treating fractured bones.
KeysToEntries.Med_IV_BloodBag_Small_Description:
A small bag of universal donor blood. This critical resource serves as a vital tool in emergency medical situations, allowing the operator to quickly administer much-needed blood transfusions without the need for blood type matching.

The Small Blood Bag is a standard medical item that is used to replenish blood.
KeysToEntries.Med_Surg_BasicSurgicalSutureKit_Descript:
A comprehensive medical package containing essential tools for minor surgical procedures to treat organ injury. It includes surgical instruments such as scissors, forceps, and needle holders, along with suture materials.

The Basic Surgical & Suture Kit is an unrivalled medical tool for treating organs.
KeysToEntries.Med_Syringe_HemostaticSyringe_Small_Desc:
An applicator loaded with hemostatic sponges that rapidly expand inside wounds, creating internal pressure to stop bleeding.

The Small Hemostatic Syringe is a superior medical item used to stop bleeding.
KeysToEntries.Med_Syringe_HemostaticSyringe_Large_Desc:
A large applicator loaded with hemostatic sponges that rapidly expand inside wounds, creating internal pressure to stop bleeding.

The Large Hemostatic Syringe is an unrivalled medical item used to stop bleeding.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_PotassiumIodine_Description:
Potassium iodide (abbreviated as KI) is a chemical compound that serves as a protective measure against radioactive iodine exposure, a byproduct of nuclear accidents or incidents. When taken orally, potassium iodide floods the thyroid gland with stable iodine, effectively blocking the absorption of radioactive iodine isotopes.

Potassium iodide is a standard pill used to cleanse the body of radiation.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_Ibalin_Description:
Civilian-grade painkillers for treating pain, fever, and inflammation. Since they dilute blood, they are not recommended to be used by armed forces. 

Ibalin is an improved pill for pain relief.
KeysToEntries.Med_IV_BloodBag_Large_Description:
A large bag of universal donor blood. This critical resource serves as a vital tool in emergency medical situations, allowing the operator to quickly administer much-needed blood transfusions without the need for blood type matching.

The Large Blood Bag is an unrivalled medical item that is used to replenish blood.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_Meloxicam_Description:
A nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug that is prescribed to manage pain and inflammation.

Meloxicam is a superior pill for pain relief.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_Paracetamol_Description:
A widely used over-the-counter medication known for its pain-relieving and fever-reducing properties. It is commonly employed to alleviate mild to moderate pain and discomfort, as well as to lower fever.

Paracetamol is a standard pill for pain relief.
KeysToEntries.Med_Band_CivilianGauze_Description:
A basic medical supply commonly used for wound care and dressing.

Civilian Gauze is a standard medical item used to treat wounds.
KeysToEntries.Med_Surg_SmallSutureKit_Description:
A compact and portable medical package designed for suturing purposes. It includes a selection of sutures, needles, and basic instruments required for stabilizing injured organs.

The Small Suture Kit is a superior medical item for treating organs.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_Moxifloxacin_Description:
A prescription antibiotic used to treat a range of bacterial infections by inhibiting the growth of bacteria and preventing their reproduction.

Moxifloxacin is a superior pill used to cleanse the body of toxins.
KeysToEntries.Med_Tour_Rats_Description:
The Multipurpose Fast Application Tourniquet is made of a solid vulcanized rubber core with a nylon sheath and a unique locking mechanism. Fast, easy to use, and works on all limb sizes.

The Multipurpose Fast Application Tourniquet is an improved medical item used to stop bleeding.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_ActivatedCharcoal_Description:
A porous substance that undergoes a special activation process to enhance its adsorption properties. Known for its ability to trap and absorb toxins, chemicals, and gases in the digestive system, it is often used to address cases of poisoning or drug overdose. 

Activated charcoal is a standard pill used to cleanse the body of toxins.
KeysToEntries.Med_Tour_RetractableTourniquet_Descripti:
A specialized medical device designed to control blood flow in emergency situations, particularly during medical procedures or trauma care.

The Retractable Tourniquet is a standard medical item used to stop bleeding.
KeysToEntries.Med_Splint_CivilianFlexibleSplint_Descri:
A lightweight and adaptable medical device used to immobilize and support injured limbs, particularly in emergency situations or in the absence of professional medical care.

The Civilian Flexible Splint is a standard medical item for treating fractured bones.
KeysToEntries.Med_Surg_EmergencySutureKit_Description:
An emergency medical package created for the most elemental suturing purposes. It includes a suture and essential instruments to treat injured organs.

The Emergency Suture Kit is an improved medical item for treating organs.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_IbalinBottle_Description:
A bottle of civilian-grade painkillers for treating pain, fever, and inflammation. Since they dilute blood, they are not recommended to be used by armed forces. 

Ibalin is an improved pill for pain relief.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_MeloxicamBottle_Description:
A bottle of a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug that is prescribed to manage pain and inflammation.

Meloxicam is a superior pill for pain relief.
KeysToEntries.Med_Pills_ParacetamolBottle_Description:
A bottle of a widely used over-the-counter medication known for its pain-relieving and fever-reducing properties. It is commonly employed to alleviate mild to moderate pain and discomfort, as well as to lower fever.

Paracetamol is a standard pill for pain relief.
KeysToEntries.Med_Splint_AdvancedFlexibleSplint_Descri:
A compact, reinforced splint with an anti slip coating designed to stabilize fractured limbs in the field, from hairline cracks to complex breaks.

The Advanced Flexible Splint is a superior medical item for treating fractured bones.
KeysToEntries.Med_IV_BloodBag_Medium_Description:
A medium-sized bag of universal donor blood. This critical resource serves as a vital tool in emergency medical situations, allowing the operator to quickly administer much-needed blood transfusions without the need for blood type matching.

The Medium Blood Bag is a superior medical item that is used to replenish blood.
